verdict_reason: Behaviour-oriented tests correctly cover the new operator session values and the port-of-entry redirect; mocks match the real yar.get/set contract and view keys match the source. One minor test-clarity nit only.

todos.issue: POST test asserts 'expect(set).not.toHaveBeenCalledWith(expect.anything())' — since set is never called this passes trivially and the shape is confusing.
todos.fix: Use 'expect(set).not.toHaveBeenCalled()' to assert the POST handler never mutates the session.
